title: psychotria pilosella subsp. erythrotricha
intro: Psychotria pilosella subsp. erythrotricha, also known as the Psychotria plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub native to tropical regions, traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psychotria pilosella subsp. erythrotricha include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
